title: END EXPANDED
description: the end just got deeper, expect the unexpected.
body:
End Expanded adds new items and mechanics to deepen gameplay in the End dimension.
🧱 Current Additions:
- Dragon Heart Pickaxe – a powerful tool with unique effects
- Dragon Heart – a mysterious item with more features coming soon
🧠 Accessibility Feature:
Includes a dedicated gamerule toggle for a specific sound type. No spoilers here—check the gamerule settings in-game to discover it.
<details><summary>Spoiler for the gamerule</summary>It toggles heartbeat sounds. This feature exists to ensure sensory safety for players who may find certain audio cues distressing.</details>This mod is still expanding, with more End-themed content planned. Built with care, not corporate gloss.
QnA


q1. is this mod coming to later versions other than 1.20.1?
a1. No. end expanded is NOT coming to any later versions because of quirks with mcreator and forge 1.20.1
(more QnA coming soon :) )



 also. heres a thing to cheer you up :)
```
public void youarevalid() {
  System.out.println("You are valid!");

}
```



made with ♥ by xcallumnicx :)
